PATIENT_ID: TEST_AKI_POA_001
ARRIVAL_TIME: 2026-03-01 10:00:00

[ED_NOTE] 2026-03-01 10:30:00
Patient presents with PMH of AKI, diabetes, hypertension.
Past medical history includes AKI requiring dialysis 6 months ago.
Creatinine: 1.4 mg/dL on arrival, within normal limits.

[LAB] 2026-03-01 10:15:00
Creatinine: 1.4 mg/dL
BUN: 22 mg/dL
GFR: 58 mL/min

[PHYSICIAN_NOTE] 2026-03-01 12:00:00
History of AKI 6 months ago, resolved. Current renal function stable.
No evidence of acute kidney injury this admission.
